hbc35d118g4340g4a36gb19cg1e1f1b22726f: Came back to join our heroic last stand?

h791ff110gd185g4125ga778gf825afcdf46f: Don't flatter yourself. I'm here for me.

h4ed3d034g15eag47a0gb05cg2217ed94f374: You know, that actually sounds pretty good.
